mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BUDGET (id, uid, date, title, type, cid, amount, memo) VALUES (#{id}, #{uid}, #{date}, #{title},#{type}, #{cid}, #{amount}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE BUDGET SET date = #{date}, title = #{title}, type = #{type}, cid = #{cid}, amount = #{amount}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id}
